testcase.name: test_create_plan_missing_name_returns_error

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 401 assert 401 in [400, 422] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter147_plans_management.py:129: in test_create_plan_missing_name_returns_error assert resp.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 401 E assert 401 in [400, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
